productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Girls Are You Game Pink Top
description: Composition Pink top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with frilled hems, keyhole neck with white tie, graphic print on the front and frilled hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this pink top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The pretty frilled edges and bow tied at the neck make this the perfect tee for your little girl. Crafted from pure cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers, shorts or skirts.
